---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include error messages / screenshots if helpful).

## Area
Which part of the app? (e.g. Finance ▸ Team Costs, OKRs, Skills Matrix, API)

## Environment
- Nova version / commit:
- Browser & OS (for web issues):
- Node version (for API issues):
- Running via: local `npm run dev` / Docker

## Additional context
Anything else that helps (logs, config, etc.).
